patches.name: Disable TargoBank root check
patches.description: Neutralises the splash 'rooted device' block by forcing the security verdict getters (o.aNj.con/Aux/AuX) to return false, so the app proceeds to the login screen. Validated on V12.68.1 (versionCode 2019102761). Note: re-signing breaks Play Integrity app-recognition; keep the app in the Magisk denylist.
